test.template:
Run smoke tests:
!`bash smoke_test.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'No smoke test found'`
!`bash install-skills.sh --list 2>/dev/null || echo 'Install script not found'`

Analyze results and suggest fixes.

review.template:
Review the current shell script for:
- Bash best practices (set -euo pipefail, quoting)
- Error handling
- Portability (bash vs sh)
- Security (injection, temp files)
- Performance (subshells, external commands)

Suggest specific improvements.
